title: taraxacum gilvistylum
intro: Taraxacum gilvistylum, also known as the Yellow Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan Province in China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant has been traditionally used to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, offering a range of health benefits for those who consume it. Taraxacum gilvistylum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal dosing.
